project.name: Project Iron Ingot (UCC INGO)
project.organization: University of Caloocan City — Computer Science Council
project.tagline: Your CS Information Board on the Go.
project.description: Public-facing website for the UCC CS Council (INGO). Surfaces BSCS program news, awards, theses, blogs, bulletins, and council/team info. Content managed in a Sanity Studio bundled inside the repo.

devCommands.npm run dev: Start Next.js (3000) AND Sanity Studio (3333) concurrently

phase1Completed.summary: All critical/high bugs from the initial audit have been fixed. The site now properly fetches and renders Sanity data without crashes.

fixes.fix: Changed GROQ `_type == "awards"` (plural) → `_type == "award"` (singular) in both getStaticPaths and getStaticProps queries. Fixes: the query now matches actual Sanity documents.
Fixed variable shadowing bug: inner `const awardPost` was shadowing outer `let awardPost`. Changed to direct assignment so fetched data reaches the page component.
Fixed GROQ `recipients[] -> { fullName }` to compute fullName as a string from the recipient object's firstName + lastName fields (recipient schema stores name as an object).
Removed dead code: module-level calls to `validateImage()` and `handleImageError()` that were called without arguments and would throw runtime errors.
Fixed scroll event listener leak: extracted handler to named variable for proper cleanup in useEffect.
Added missing `awardContent` field (PortableText/block array) for rich text award descriptions. Added missing `recipients` field (array of references to `recipient` documents).
Added missing `headerImage` field (image type) to match Prefetcher query projection.
Added missing `headerImage` field (image type) to match Prefetcher query projection.
Fixed pronoun validation: added `if (!value) return true` so optional field doesn't incorrectly reject empty values.
Changed award query field from `awardRecipients[]` (nonexistent) to `recipients[]` (now added to schema). Fixed `fullName` to compute string from object. Fixed typo `yearLeve` → `yearLevel`.
Changed hardcoded `useState("Ingo Bot")` to read `siteConfig?.chatbotName` from CMS, falling back to "Ingo Bot".

remainingIssues.issue: Awards index page fetches from Sanity independently despite Prefetcher also loading awards. Low priority — index needs richer image metadata (dimensions) than Prefetcher provides.
remainingIssues.suggestion: Either extend Prefetcher query to include image dimensions, or accept the separate fetch.

remainingIssues.issue: About page fetches council + devTeam data directly via Sanity; not integrated with Prefetcher.
remainingIssues.suggestion: Keep as-is since council/team data changes infrequently.

remainingIssues.issue: Sanity Studio v2 is in legacy maintenance mode.
remainingIssues.suggestion: Plan migration to Sanity v3 when resources allow.

remainingIssues.issue: Footer copyright year is hardcoded to 2026 instead of dynamic.
remainingIssues.suggestion: Use `new Date().getFullYear()` or read from siteConfig.

goals: Single source of truth for CS Council information (awards, blogs, bulletins, theses, council, gallery).
Editorial team can update content via Sanity Studio without touching code.
Fast, animated, responsive site with strong SEO and accessibility.
Local development should boot both the website and the Studio in one command.
Handoff-ready for future CS Council officers to maintain.
nonGoals: Server-side personalization or analytics dashboards in v1.

audiences.name: Editorial Team (Council officers)
needs: Author and publish blogs/bulletins/awards in Sanity

website.purpose: Landing — hero, features, awards, gallery, latest content, council, FAQ
Awards listing with year filter, sort, lightbox
Award detail page with PortableText content, recipients, images
About the council — council roster, committees, dev team

dataFlow.prefetcher: Client-side context (Prefetcher.js) loads blogs, bulletins, thesis, awards, gallery, siteConfig on app mount. Used by: landing page, list pages, search modal, navbar dropdowns.
dataFlow.ssg: Detail pages (blog/[slug], bulletin/[slug], thesis/[slug], awards/[slug], gallery/[slug]) use getStaticProps + getStaticPaths with ISR (revalidate: 10s).
dataFlow.directFetch: About page fetches council + devTeam directly via client.fetch(). Awards index fetches independently for richer image data.

phase2Planned.summary: Improvements to be tackled after Phase 1 bug fixes are verified.

items.name: Improve Council section
items.description: Expandable officer details, year selector for past councils, committee display on landing page

items.name: Mobile responsiveness audit
items.description: Review and fix breakpoint issues across all pages

items.name: SEO improvements
items.description: Structured data (JSON-LD), improved meta tags, sitemap optimization

items.name: Sanity v3 migration
items.description: Migrate from @sanity/base v2 to Sanity Studio v3
items.notes: Requires separate effort — breaking changes in plugin system

items.name: Vercel deployment setup
items.description: Configure Vercel project, env vars, custom domain, CI/CD

items.name: Handoff documentation
items.description: README with setup guide, architecture docs, maintenance guide for future council officers

required.name: SANITY_API_TOKEN
required.purpose: Optional read token for private datasets

required.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
required.purpose: Google Gemini API key for CSBot
